diagrams.title: Bresenham's Algorithm Decision Process
diagrams.description: Shows how the algorithm chooses between two candidate pixels at each step by comparing the midpoint to the actual line

diagrams.title: Pixel Selection Pattern
diagrams.description: Illustrates the actual pixel pattern produced when drawing a line with slope 0.5 using Bresenham's algorithm

diagrams.title: Decision Parameter Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the decision-making process at each iteration of the algorithm
diagrams.purpose: Understand algorithm flow and decision logic
